name: CNFC Overseas Fisheries Co.,Ltd
summary: CNFC Overseas Fisheries Co.,Ltd engages in the distant water fishery business in China and internationally. The company offers squid, saury, tuna, and related processed marine products. It is also involved in the aquatic products trading; the import and export of fishing machinery, gears, and other related equipment and supplies; and ship repair and other activities. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Beijing, China.
